steps.title: Identify the key action in the examples
steps.content: The examples showcase artists deliberately incorporating and combining Indigenous musical elements with other styles—throat singing mixed with electric music, powwow melodies blended with rock.

steps.title: Match the verb to this blending
steps.content: Reject distinctions means refusing to accept that Indigenous and other styles should remain separate. Disguise (to hide), replace (to substitute), and observe (to notice) each describe actions at odds with this refusal. This matches choice B — B is correct.
